title: Deep Fried Malaysian Mozzarella Skewers
description: A Malaysian-inspired brunch dish featuring crispy fried mozzarella balls, perfect for a savory and satisfying meal. This dish combines the richness of mozzarella with the bold flavors of Malaysian cuisine.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, cornstarch, salt, and white pepper.
In a separate dish, beat the eggs.
In a third dish, place the panko breadcrumbs.
Dip each mozzarella ball into the flour mixture, then the eggs, and finally the panko breadcrumbs, coating evenly.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Fry the mozzarella balls in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per batch.
Remove the fried mozzarella balls from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the deep fried mozzarella balls hot on skewers.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
